classification.ClassificationReasonText: This user was excluded due to being notified of their travel.

body.MailTipsOptions: automaticReplies, deliveryRestriction, externalMemberCount, mailboxFullStatus, maxMessageSize, moderationStatus, totalMemberCount

body.messageBody:
@{triggerBody()?['object']?['properties']?['title']}, The user @{body('Get_user_profile_(V2)')?['displayName']} has no "Out of Office" turned on.


Message have been sent to Manager or Region Admin to verify travel, will wait 30 minuties for response.

recipient.summary: The employee @{body('Get_user_profile_(V2)')?['displayName']} triggered Impossible Travel alert please verify if you know they are working remote or activity is expected.

body.messageBody:
@{variables('Description')}

Could you please verify with @{body('Get_user_profile_(V2)')?['displayName']}  if there have been any recent travels or remote work that could explain this alert? Your prompt attention to this matter is greatly appreciated. 

Approve: Select this option if you are aware of the flagged activity, such as @{body('Get_user_profile_(V2)')?['displayName']} traveling or logging in from an unfamaliar location. 

Deny: Select this option if you are not aware of the flagged activity and suspect that it may be a result of unauthorized access.

Region A Admin has denied recent travel activity linked to their account. Immediate escalation and review required.

Comments: @{outputs('RegionA_comment')}

Security Notification: Travel Activity Approved by Region A Admin


Region A Admin has confirmed @{body('Get_user_profile_(V2)')?['displayName']} recent travel activity as legimate. Please keep this as as a record. The Incident/Alert associated with this activity be closed automatically.


Comments: @{outputs('RegionA_comment')}
Received no response from Region A Admin in the last 30 minutes, this needs to be investigated.

recipient.summary: The employee @{body('Get_user_profile_(V2)')?['displayName']} triggered Impossible Travel alert please verify if you know they are working remote or activity is expected.

body.messageBody:
@{variables('Description')}

Could you please verify with @{body('Get_user_profile_(V2)')?['displayName']}  if there have been any recent travels or remote work that could explain this alert? Your prompt attention to this matter is greatly appreciated. 

We understand that this could be a simple misunderstanding, but we take any potential security threats very seriously to ensure the safety and integrity of our systems. 

Thank you for your assistance. Please contact us directly with any information or if you have any questions.

Approve: Select this option if you are aware of the flagged activity, such as @{body('Get_user_profile_(V2)')?['displayName']} traveling or logging in from an unfamaliar location. 

Deny: Select this option if you are not aware of the flagged activity and suspect that it may be a result of unauthorized access.

@{body('Get_user_profile_(V2)')?['displayName']} manager has denied recent travel activity linked to their account. Immediate escalation and review required.

Comments: @{outputs('Manager_Comment')}

Security Notification: Travel Activity Approved by @{body('Get_manager_(V2)')?['displayName']}


@{body('Get_manager_(V2)')?['displayName']} has confirmed @{body('Get_user_profile_(V2)')?['displayName']} recent travel activity as legitimate. Please keep this as a record. The alert associated with this activity be closed automatically.


Comments: @{outputs('Manager_Comment')}
Recieved no response from @{body('Get_user_profile_(V2)')?['displayName']} manager in the last 30 minutes, this needs to be investigated.

The user @{body('Get_user_profile_(V2)')?['displayName']} email tip shows a out of office and is traveling.

OOF message: @{trim(replace(outputs('Get_Automatic_Replies_')?['message'], ' ', ' '))}
